nasb.text: You shall invite Jesse to the sacrifice, and I will show you what you shall do; and you shall anoint for Me the one whom I designate to you.”

esv.text: And invite Jesse to the sacrifice, and I will show you what you shall do. And you shall anoint for me him whom I declare to you.”

cnv.text: 你要請耶西參加獻祭的筵席，我就會指示你當作的。我指示你的那人，你要為我膏立他。”

ccb.text: 你要请耶西参加献祭，我会告诉你怎么做，我会指示你膏立谁。”
